name: ASP.NET Misconfiguration: Missing Custom Error Page
description: An ASP.NET application does not configure custom error pages, causing default error handlers to expose detailed stack traces, framework versions, and platform information to attackers.
detection_pattern: META[web_config] node has customErrors mode=Off or lacks customErrors configuration, allowing CONTROL[error_handler] to fall through to default ASP.NET EGRESS[error_response] that exposes internal details without TRANSFORM[redaction]
